utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , look , he is not gonna hurt them , right ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Do you always have to bring him here ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Do you always have to bring him here ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I did not wanna leave him alone .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: We ... we had our first fight this morning .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I think it has to do with my working late .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I said some things that I did not mean , and he ... he threw some faeces ...

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You know , if you are gonna work late , I could look in on him for you .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , but if you do , make sure it seems like you are there to see him , okay , and you are not like doing it as a favour to me .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Okay , but if he asks , I am not going to lie .
